name: human-mcp
description: Local Windows MCP for desktop automation tools.

tools.name: enter_text
tools.description: Type text using the system keyboard.

tools.name: single_click_mouse
tools.description: Move the mouse to a screen coordinate and perform a left click.

tools.name: move_mouse
tools.description: Move the mouse to a screen coordinate.

tools.name: double_click_mouse
tools.description: Move the mouse and perform a double left click.

tools.name: right_click_mouse
tools.description: Move the mouse and perform a right click.

tools.name: search_point_or_area_on_screen
tools.description: Search the screen for an image or area. Placeholder implementation.
